name: Open Primitive
description: Federal public safety and consumer data across 13 US government domains. Real agencies, real numbers, structured for agents.

skills.name: Flight Status
skills.description: FAA ground delays, weather disruptions, and historical on-time performance for 7 major US airlines across 30 hub airports. Sources: FAA NAS, BTS on-time data, Open-Meteo forecasts.
examples: Are there FAA delays at JFK right now?
How reliable is Delta out of Atlanta in January?
What's the weather doing at O'Hare today?

skills.name: Car Safety
skills.description: NHTSA 5-star crash test ratings and active recall notices for vehicles sold in the US. Covers frontal, side, and rollover ratings plus open recall campaigns with remedy status.
examples: What are the crash ratings for a 2024 Toyota Camry?
Are there open recalls on my 2021 Ford F-150?
Which 2024 SUVs have 5-star overall safety ratings?

skills.name: Food Recalls
skills.description: Active FDA food recall alerts including reason, severity classification, and distribution scope. Covers Class I (serious health risk) through Class III recalls for products on US shelves.
examples: Any recent Class I food recalls?
Has peanut butter been recalled this month?
What food recalls are active in California?

skills.name: Water Safety
skills.description: EPA Safe Drinking Water Act violations by water system, county, or ZIP code. Covers contaminant levels, treatment failures, and monitoring gaps reported to the EPA SDWIS database.
examples: Does my ZIP code 48201 have clean drinking water?
What EPA violations has Detroit's water system had?
Which contaminants exceed safe levels in Flint, Michigan?

skills.name: Drug Safety
skills.description: FDA adverse event reports (FAERS) and structured product labeling for prescription and OTC drugs. Surfaces reported side effects, black box warnings, and drug interaction signals.
examples: What adverse events are reported for metformin?
Does lisinopril have a black box warning?
What are the most common side effects of Ozempic?

skills.name: Hospital Quality
skills.description: CMS star ratings, mortality rates, readmission rates, and patient experience scores for every Medicare-certified hospital in the US. Direct from Hospital Compare.
examples: What's the CMS star rating for Mayo Clinic?
Which hospitals near ZIP 10001 have the lowest readmission rates?
How does Johns Hopkins rank on patient experience?

skills.name: Health Evidence
skills.description: PubMed research summaries for health claims and supplement questions. Returns study counts, evidence quality tiers, and plain-language summaries so agents can ground health answers in published research.
examples: Is there evidence that turmeric reduces inflammation?
What does the research say about melatonin for sleep?
How strong is the evidence for vitamin D and immune function?

skills.name: Location Safety
skills.description: Cross-domain safety profile for any US ZIP code. Pulls water violations, hospital quality, food recall exposure, and air travel reliability into a single composite view. Built for relocation decisions and local risk assessment.
examples: Give me a safety profile for ZIP code 90210.
How does 60614 compare to 30301 on public safety data?
What should I know about living in ZIP 02134?

skills.name: Nutrition Facts
skills.description: USDA food nutrition data including calories, macronutrients, vitamins, and minerals for thousands of common foods. Direct from the USDA FoodData Central database.
examples: How many calories in a banana?
Nutrition facts for Greek yogurt
Is oatmeal high in fiber?

skills.name: Employment & Economic Data
skills.description: Bureau of Labor Statistics data covering unemployment rates, consumer price index, average wages, and labor force participation. Monthly and annual series direct from BLS public APIs.
examples: What is the current unemployment rate?
Show me CPI data for the last year
Average wages in the US

skills.name: Demographics by ZIP Code
skills.description: Census American Community Survey data by ZIP code including median household income, population counts, poverty rates, housing occupancy, and educational attainment. Direct from Census ACS 5-year estimates.
examples: What is the median income in 90210?
Population of ZIP 10001
Poverty rate in rural Kentucky

skills.name: Consumer Product Recalls
skills.description: Consumer Product Safety Commission recall notices for household goods, children's products, and electronics sold in the US. Covers hazard descriptions, remedy actions, and incident counts.
examples: Recent product recalls
Are there recalls on cribs?
Safety alerts for children's toys

skills.name: SEC Corporate Filings
skills.description: SEC EDGAR filings including 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly reports, and 8-K current reports for publicly traded US companies. Structured access to financial disclosures and corporate events.
examples: Apple's latest 10-K filing
Tesla revenue history
Recent 8-K filings for Microsoft
